column1: # SheSafe Risk Zone Dataset (Generated using LatinHypercube Sampling)
# Risk Model: Weighted combination of urban density
# - radius_meters: Influence radius of the risk zone
# LatinHypercube sampling provides better spatial coverage than simple random sampling
# ensuring representative distribution across the study area without clustering artifacts.
